introSection: Flying Fox is a steel inverted roller coaster built by Dutch firm Vekoma currently under construction at Kentucky Kingdom in Louisville, Kentucky, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Construction fences with teasers appeared at the park during the summer of 2025.

The ride was announced on October 27, 2025.

The ride went vertical by February 15, 2026.

fullText:
Flying Fox is a steel inverted roller coaster built by Dutch firm Vekoma currently under construction at Kentucky Kingdom in Louisville, Kentucky, USA.

Construction fences with teasers appeared at the park during the summer of 2025.

The ride was announced on October 27, 2025.

The ride went vertical by February 15, 2026.
